case_title: RAINBOW DENTAL LABORATORY, INC. VS. JULIE KARNAZES DR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,512.15 FILED BY RAINBOW DENTAL LABORATORY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KARNAZES DR., JULIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
